messages.content: You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como criar Load Balancer com backend set e listener no OCI via Terraform?
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como adicionar certificado SSL ao Load Balancer via Terraform?

SSL no Load Balancer:

**Certificado customizado:**
```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_certificate" "cert" {
  load_balancer_id   = oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.web.id
  certificate_name   = "ssl-cert"
  ca_certificate     = file("${path.module}/ca.pem")
  public_certificate = file("${path.module}/cert.pem")
  private_key        = file("${path.module}/key.pem")
}
```

**Listener HTTPS:**
```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_listener" "https" {
  load_balancer_id         = oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.web.id
  name                     = "https"
  default_backend_set_name = oci_load_balancer_backend_set.backend.name
  port                     = 443
  protocol                 = "HTTP"
  ssl_configuration {
    certificate_name = oci_load_balancer_certificate.cert.certificate_name
    protocols        = ["TLSv1.2", "TLSv1.3"]
  }
}
```

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs

Como configurar path-based routing no Load Balancer OCI?
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como resolver erro de subnet insuficiente ao criar Load Balancer?

Troubleshooting subnet:

**Erro:** The subnet must have at least 2 available IP addresses

**Soluções:**
1. Use subnet maior: /24 em vez de /28
2. Crie subnet dedicada para LB: cidr_block = "10.0.10.0/24"
3. Libere IPs na subnet existente

**Requisitos:** Mínimo 2 IPs, subnet regional, route table com Internet Gateway

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como troubleshootar backends em WARNING no Load Balancer?

Troubleshooting backends:

**1. Verifique:** oci lb backend list --load-balancer-id <ocid>

**2. Causas comuns:**
- Health check URL não existe
- Security List bloqueando
- Serviço não rodando

**3. Debug:**
```bash
curl -v http://<backend-ip>:80/health
```

**4. Ajuste health checker:**
```hcl
health_checker {
  interval_ms       = 15000
  timeout_in_millis = 5000
  retries           = 5
}
```

**5. States:** OK, WARNING, CRITICAL, DRAIN

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como importar Load Balancer existente para o state?

Importar LB:

```bash
terraform import oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.imported <lb-ocid>
terraform import oci_load_balancer_backend_set.imported <lb-ocid>/backendSetName
terraform import oci_load_balancer_backend.imported <lb-ocid>/backendSetName/ip:port
terraform import oci_load_balancer_listener.imported <lb-ocid>/listenerName
```

Complete .tf com atributos do state e valide

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como configurar SSL termination com certificados gerenciados OCI?
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como configurar Network Load Balancer (NLB) via Terraform?

Network Load Balancer (Layer 4):

```hcl
resource "oci_network_load_balancer_network_load_balancer" "nlb" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  display_name   = "app-nlb"
  subnet_id      = oci_core_subnet.private.id
  is_private     = true
}

resource "oci_network_load_balancer_backend_set" "nlb_bs" {
  network_load_balancer_id = oci_network_load_balancer_network_load_balancer.nlb.id
  name                     = "tcp-backend"
  policy                   = "FIVE_TUPLE"
  health_checker { protocol = "TCP"; port = 8080 }
}

resource "oci_network_load_balancer_listener" "nlb_listener" {
  network_load_balancer_id = oci_network_load_balancer_network_load_balancer.nlb.id
  name                     = "tcp"
  default_backend_set_name = oci_network_load_balancer_backend_set.nlb_bs.name
  port                     = 8080
  protocol                 = "TCP"
}
```

NLB vs ALB: Layer 4 vs Layer 7, menor latência, sem SSL

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como gerenciar múltiplos backends com pesos diferentes?

Backends com pesos:

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_backend_set" "weighted" {
  load_balancer_id = oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.web.id
  name             = "weighted-backend"
  policy           = "WEIGHTED_ROUND_ROBIN"
}

resource "oci_load_balancer_backend" "primary" {
  load_balancer_id = oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.web.id
  backendset_name  = oci_load_balancer_backend_set.weighted.name
  ip_address       = oci_core_instance.large.private_ip
  port             = 80
  weight           = 3  # 3x mais tráfego
}

resource "oci_load_balancer_backend" "secondary" {
  backendset_name = oci_load_balancer_backend_set.weighted.name
  ip_address      = oci_core_instance.small.private_ip
  port            = 80
  weight          = 1
  backup          = true  # Só se primary falhar
}
```

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in load balancer resources. Provide technical guidance on load balancer, backend sets, and SSL certificates.
Como configurar health checks avançados no Load Balancer?

Health checks avançados:

```hcl
resource "oci_load_balancer_backend_set" "backend" {
  load_balancer_id = oci_load_balancer_load_balancer.web.id
  name             = "app-backend"
  policy           = "LEAST_CONNECTIONS"
  health_checker {
    protocol          = "HTTPS"
    port              = 443
    url_path          = "/health/deep"
    interval_ms       = 10000
    timeout_in_millis = 3000
    retries           = 3
    return_code       = 200
    response_body_regex = ".*OK.*"
  }
}
```

**Políticas:** ROUND_ROBIN, LEAST_CONNECTIONS, IP_HASH, WEIGHTED_ROUND_ROBIN

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
